page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Computer-Aided Synthesis Planning for Biocatalytic Reactions and Cascades.

A collection of tools for automated biocatalytic cascade design.

Any feedback is very welcome. Please email william.finnigan@manchester.ac.uk.
